text.title: Product Explainability Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed across deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Product invisible in Perplexity / ChatGPT product comparisons.
antipattern.root-cause: schema.org markup absent on the product page.
antipattern.fix: Emit Product + SoftwareApplication JSON-LD; validate via product-kb-validate.sh.

antipattern.symptom: AI surfaces claim product does X (it doesn't); customers churn after trial.
antipattern.root-cause: Feature page listed capabilities only; no boundary statement.
antipattern.fix: Add 'what this does NOT do' section per feature page.

antipattern.symptom: AI summaries garble feature descriptions; sales gets 'what does this even do?' calls.
antipattern.fix: Rewrite to ≤grade 11 or move behind login.

antipattern.symptom: AI surfaces serve last quarter's feature set; reps lose deals on outdated info.
antipattern.root-cause: No machine-readable changelog; updates only land in marketing posts.
antipattern.fix: Publish RSS + JSON Feed changelog within 24h of every release.
